name: hoc/date-picker
description: A higher-order date-picker component that combines a DatePicker input, a Popover calendar panel, and locale-aware formatting into a single ready-to-use form field. Handles open/close state, input masking, validation messages, and custom parse/format adapters. Composed of DatePicker, Popover, Button, and TextField primitives with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Booking and reservation forms requiring a single date or date-range input with calendar popover
Invoice due-date fields in accounting applications with locale-aware long-format display
Event-creation wizards that validate date availability and prevent past-date selection
Filter panels in analytics dashboards for custom date-range pickers with quick presets
